calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lewis Gilliam. Petitioner, Marianna Carvalho Beyari, was sworn and examined. The grants Decree changing petitioner's name to Marianne Loves Dove. Decree signed in open court.
